title: No Contact Rule and the Power of Time On Your Ex
text: this is coach lee in this video i'm going to talk to you about no contact and the power of time if you haven't already click the subscribe button below so that you can be notified when i have and the same is true when you're getting your ex back you can't just crank up the intensity or add more manpower to it or call more or text more and expect that you're going to get your ex back faster hurtful things the time can actually be a way for your ex to cool off to reflect and to realize that one or both of you overreacted and that the relationship is potentially worth saving and so letting the smoke clear letting emotions calm down is something that time can definitely help with i know that's not every situation and i certainly have other things to say i'm just pointing that out because some people that's the quick answer that time can do the most in terms of just letting things calm down there's been a big fight or argument or bad things were said hurtful things and that might be the most obvious thing but that's why i mentioned it first so next on the list is going to be that time allows your ex to be sure because with the breakup they didn't just wake up and decide to break up with you again unless it was in the heat of the moment where there was anger and hurtful things being said but in general they didn't just wake up and say i think it'd be a good idea to break up title: No Contact Rule and the Power of Time On Your Ex
text: at can only happen if you give them the breakup and most people overestimate their ability to change things with their ex by talking to them and trying to control the situation because what you're experiencing is loss of control you used to think you two had something stable but now you realize that the ground underneath you has fallen it's fallen through you don't have any solid ground to stand on and it feels like your ex has all the power because it's their decision they'll come back to you you two will get back together they won't come back to you you won't have them anymore but when you pull back you do not chase what happens is the power begins to shift to where at least it's balanced because your ex realizes that you are strong enough to stay away from them and that's where as i mentioned earlier in the video your ex can see that the potential exists that they could want you back but that you would be gone that they couldn't get you back and so time time is what prevents your ex from becoming your dictator because in the moment you can't get your ex back in this moment and so that's where desperation and panic and urgency comes in because you feel like if you don't get your ex back in this moment you will lose them forever which is not true but you begin to act out of desperation and you do the things that actually push your ex away and it shows them that they're not in danger of losing you and a lot of times that will linger the worse that you beg and chase and plead and act like your life has just fallen into a pit that you dwell in darkness without your ex that will extend this period longer to where they think i could get this person back so i don't have to really make a permanent decision this could just be temporary i can get them back
